name: logistics coordinators processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For logistics coordinators processing 10–20 invoices/month, billing errors cause cash flow gaps. We validate carrier invoices instead of manual invoice verification.
problem_solved: Frequent billing errors in carrier invoices.
